The '''XQ4 Platform''' was built by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] as a replacement for the [[XQ1 Platform]] as a light space installation.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
